shadcn-html / pagination

Made from: CSS

Pagination

Page navigation with previous/next links and page numbers.

Component Specification — components/pagination/pagination.md

Native basis

<nav> + links for page navigation.

Web Platform APIs

<nav>

Default

  • ‹ Previous
  • 1
  • 2
  • 3
  • …
  • Next ›
<nav class="pagination" aria-label="Pagination">
  <ul class="pagination-list">
    <li><a class="pagination-prev" href="#">Previous</a></li>
    <li><a class="pagination-link pagination-active" href="#" aria-current="page">1</a></li>
    <li><a class="pagination-link" href="#">2</a></li>
    <li><a class="pagination-next" href="#">Next</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>
